entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop used for oil and food.

entities.name: ICGV 86325
entities.description: A groundnut variety bred and developed at ICRISAT Asia Center.

entities.name: ICRISAT ASIA CENTER
entities.description: The research center where ICGV 86325 was developed.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where ICRISAT Asia Center is located and where Kaushal was released.

entities.name: BULK PEDIGREE METHOD
entities.description: The selection method used to develop ICGV 86325.

entities.name: ICGS 20
entities.description: A high-yielding breeding line used as a parent for ICGV 86325.

entities.name: G 201
entities.description: A parent line used for ICGV 86325, released as Kaushal.

entities.name: KAUSHAL
entities.description: The released name of the groundnut variety G 201 in India.

entities.name: HIGH YIELD
entities.description: The characteristic of producing a large amount of crop per unit area, attributed to ICGS 20.

entities.name: LOW-INPUT RAINFED CULTIVATION
entities.description: The agricultural environment for which ICGV 86325 is suitable.
